locations.name: 索科特拉岛
locations.summary: 索科特拉岛（阿拉伯語：سقطرى，羅馬化：Suquṭrā；索科特拉語：ساقطْري，羅馬化：Saqaṭri），明代《郑和航海图》称为须多大屿、速古答剌，是非洲之角以东，印度洋西部一群岛，位于北纬12.18°～12.42°与东经53.19…

relations.subject: Socotra buzzard
relations.evidence: As its name implies, it is native to the island of Socotra, Yemen. Although it is listed as vulnerable in the IUCN Red List, its population is considered to be stable
